findings.bootBehavior: FATAL: Server refused to start when Redis is unavailable

notes: Server enters crash loop on boot when Redis is unavailable
Boot-time security checks cannot complete without Redis
Load balancer returns 502 — no payments can be processed
This is stronger than a soft fail: the entire service refuses to start
Redis was immediately restored; final payment confirmed HTTP 200
verdict: PASS — system fails closed when Redis is unavailable
